a: Look up A (IPv4 address) records for a domain.
aaaa: Look up AAAA (IPv6 address) records for a domain.
arin: Look up IP address information from ARIN.
asn: Look up Autonomous System Number information and route validity.
bimi: Look up BIMI records for a domain.
blacklist: Check an IP address against DNS-based blacklists.
blocklist: Check a domain against URI and domain blocklists.
bulk: Run DNS lookups for a list of domains.
cert: Look up DNS CERT records for a domain.
cname: Look up CNAME records for a domain.
compliance: Check email compliance requirements for a domain.
deliverability: Check email deliverability factors for a domain.
dkim: Look up DKIM records or discover common DKIM selectors.
dmarc: Look up and analyze DMARC policy for a domain.
dmarc-generator: Generate a DMARC record from policy settings.
dmarc-report: Parse and analyze DMARC aggregate XML reports.
dns-health: Run a comprehensive DNS health check for a domain.
dns-propagation: Check DNS propagation across public resolvers.
dnskey: Look up DNSKEY records for a domain.
domain-health: Run combined DNS, mail, web, and reputation checks.
ds: Look up DS records for a domain.
email-extract: Extract email addresses from text input.
header-analyzer: Analyze email headers from a file or stdin.
http: Check HTTP connectivity and response details for a URL.
https: Check HTTPS connectivity and TLS certificate details.
ipseckey: Look up DNS IPSECKEY records for a domain or IP.
loc: Look up DNS LOC geographic location records.
mailflow: Run an end-to-end mail flow diagnostic.
mta-sts: Look up and validate MTA-STS policy for a domain.
mx: Look up MX records for a domain.
ns: Look up NS records for a domain.
nsec: Look up NSEC records for a domain.
nsec3param: Look up NSEC3PARAM records for a domain.
ping: Ping a host using ICMP echo requests.
ptr: Perform a reverse DNS PTR lookup for an IP address.
rrsig: Look up DNSSEC RRSIG records for a domain.
smtp: Test SMTP connectivity and STARTTLS behavior.
soa: Look up SOA records for a domain.
samba-browse: Browse SMB/Samba server metadata and shares.
spf: Look up and analyze SPF records for a domain.
spf-generator: Generate an SPF record from selected mechanisms.
srv: Look up SRV service records for a domain.
subnet-calc: Calculate subnet details from CIDR notation.
tcp: Check TCP port connectivity and optionally grab a banner.
tlsrpt: Look up SMTP TLS reporting policy for a domain.
trace: Trace the network route to a host.
txt: Look up TXT records for a domain.
whatismyip: Show the current public IP address.
